历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 1119→852→654→417→329, showing a continuous forward trend, with a cumulative forward shift of about 790 places in the past 4 years. The 2025 baseline is about 329, and competition is intensifying year by year. From 2021 to 2025, the enrollment plans for Physics Category were 49, 40, 39, 26, and 16 respectively, showing a continuous reduction trend. The 2026 plan is 31, a significant expansion of about 93.75% compared to 2025, with a notable expansion magnitude, exerting considerable downward pressure on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 12th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking (11th in 2021→13th in 2022→13th in 2023→16th in 2024→14th in 2025→12th in 2026), firmly among the top universities in the country. The 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranking is 10th (high heat), with high exposure on short video platforms and relatively high application attention. Historical admission anomaly records are neutral/mixed, with no serious gap signals. It has 17 A- or above disciplines including Mechanics A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Control Science and Engineering A, etc., with top engineering strength, highly matching the current hot engineering majors. Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other engineering majors have been continuously recommended as hot from 2024 to 2026, and HIT's advantageous disciplines are highly aligned with this. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Gansu Province is about 147,600 (estimated based on historical proportions), an increase of about 21.5% compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Harbin Institute of Technology is located in Heilongjiang Province, not a local university in this province. Its enrollment proportion in Gansu Province is about 1.1%–2.8%, belonging to cross-provincial enrollment. There is no significant regional preference effect.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant expansion of the 2026 Physics Category enrollment plan (+93.75%), the increase in the number of candidates in Gansu Province (+21.5%), the rise in school ranking, and the high Douyin heat, a slight upward adjustment of 10 places to 524 is made. The expansion effect is the dominant factor for the downward shift in ranking, but the increase in candidates and the rise in school heat partially offset the impact of expansion. The predicted minimum ranking is about 524, with a range of 461–587.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Within the predicted ranking range of 461–587, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, with Tier 1 majors as a sprint and Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<461), focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Academician Special Class/Future Technology Top Class; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>587), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors with Tier 2 as a supplement. HIT's Engineering Experimental Class adopts a broad category enrollment with free choice of majors within the category, providing considerable room for selection after admission.
